use_cases: Displaying a stacked collection of images with interactive drag-to-cycle behavior
Creating an engaging photo gallery with visual depth through rotation offsets
Building a playful portfolio showcase with swipeable image cards
Implementing an interactive product image viewer for e-commerce
Adding visual interest to image presentations with animated card stacking
ai_summary: An interactive image stack component that displays multiple images in a visually layered card format with rotation offsets and vertical positioning. Supports drag interactions via Framer Motion to cycle through the stack, automatically animating cards back into position. Features a clean, minimalist aesthetic suitable for galleries, portfolios, or product showcases.
